enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Tamil Pasanga, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the youthful spirit and camaraderie among friends. Set against the backdrop of Thalaivaa, it conveys a message of celebration and joy, making it a perfect anthem for parties and gatherings. The lively beats and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and togetherness, inviting listeners to join in the fun. This song encapsulates the essence of Tamil culture, celebrating life and friendship.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Tamil Pasanga from the movie Thalaivaa is a vibrant celebration of youth and energy, featuring an electrifying collaboration between Benny Dayal and Psycho Unit. The infectious beats and catchy lyrics make it a perfect anthem for any festive occasion. Dive into the rhythm and let the spirit of Tamil culture uplift your mood!
stanzaMeanings: As the journey begins, the youth should shine brightly. Let the dawn bring forth a new beginning, and let the dance of life be celebrated. Tamil, Tamil, you rise high.
No matter where we are, whatever we do... it's all about Tamil. Joy and music come together.
Boys, boys, Tamil Tamil boys. Boys, boys, Tamil Tamil boys. We will uphold this land, we are Tamil boys.
From Thirunelveli to Madurai, we enjoy the songs of Chennai. We sing about the fields, and the cows roam freely, while we work and sing.
Our peacock dance, our joyful dance, our pride shines bright. In our streets and songs, happiness will come flowing.
Boys, boys, Tamil Tamil boys. Boys, boys, Tamil Tamil boys. We will uphold this land, we are Tamil boys.
No matter where we are, whatever we do... it's all about Tamil. Joy and music come together.
Watch me run like a two-legged horse, without knowing the world. Come, let’s play the game. Who is our leader? In our village, who are the kids like us?
Like flowers, idli and dosa, with a twist of spice. Tamil is alive, telling many stories, kabadi kabadi, brave Tamil.
We will play hide and seek, and wave the victory flag. Tamil songs and the teachings of Thirukkural will always thrive.
No matter where we are, whatever we do... it's all about Tamil. Joy and music come together.
Boys, boys, Tamil Tamil boys. Boys, boys, Tamil Tamil boys. We will uphold this land, we are Tamil boys.
